scripts.build:server: bun run --cwd ../api ui-manifest && bun build ../api/src/index.ts --target=bun --outdir dist-server --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server && electrobun build
scripts.build:stable: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server && electrobun build --env=stable
